scripts.vendor:webawesome: rm -rf static/vendor/webawesome && mkdir -p static/vendor/webawesome && npx esbuild static/webawesome-init.js --bundle --format=esm --minify --outfile=static/vendor/webawesome/webawesome.bundle.js && npx esbuild node_modules/@awesome.me/webawesome/dist/styles/webawesome.css --bundle --minify --outfile=static/vendor/webawesome/webawesome.bundle.css
scripts.vendor: mkdir -p static && npm run vendor:js && npm run vendor:css && npm run vendor:webawesome && npm run vendor:split
scripts.update:ui-vendor: npm update @awesome.me/webawesome split.js && npm run vendor
